message:
chore(engine): register semantic twin modules in lib.rs

Add `pub mod semantic_twin` and `pub mod semantic_twin_state_space`
declarations to lib.rs, making the FRX-19.1 semantic twin modules
accessible from the crate's public API. These modules were added in
the previous commit but the lib.rs registration was applied by a
concurrent agent.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
